positive: A whimsical, highly stylized arrangement of various forest flora and fauna, including glowing fireflies forming constellations, intricate roots weaving together, delicate mushrooms with luminescent caps, and small, stylized woodland creatures peeking from behind leaves. The composition should be a dense, centralized, symmetrical wreath or circular mandala design. Style: Flat illustration meets Neo-Art Deco botanicals, rendered with crisp lines, saturated jewel tones (deep emerald, sapphire, amethyst, gold leaf accents), and high contrast. Lighting: Bioluminescent glow emanating from the flora, creating deep shadows and bright focal points. Composition: Perfect circle/wreath format, optimized for repeat pattern use, isolated on a clean background. Highly detailed, vector quality, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, messy, realistic photo, photograph, watermark, signature, logo, text, low resolution, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, smudges, gradient background
